title: Dream
lyrics:
Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh
Can you feel that dream alive again?
Oh yeah, I don't know what it takes here
Have you been what I know, there?
Are you here for me forever?
Are you dreaming real?
But my dreams, they are coming in night
Makes me know what's right
Makes me wanna be everything
to you again our dreams yeah
I got more of them here
Inside of me, you'll hear
I'm all about it yeah all the time
And I got these dreams I know that I fight
I don't know if they're right
When you know that you're right there
Dreaming with me
These just dreams that you don't know
I said all day, all day, healing
Till it gets, till it gets feeling
Oh, these dreams keep me up at night
These wants make me wanna fight off
An intellectual part of me
I said these dreams keep me up at night
These hearts always take me the wrong way
Hard way, every which way
But my own is some semblance of whats on my mind
And I don't wanna think about all the times
That I broke your heart
And took your dreams away, baby
But I know these dreams are sticking with me
And another chance and we'll be
What we want to see, oh baby
These dreams, they be coming up right
Yeah, they be making me fight
Yeah, they be making me fuck my life up all the way
But I know that you can dream with me
A little brighter and be more than we see
Come on now, be more than you ever thought could be
With these dreams in your night
Yeah, these dreams, they fight you
But do they haunt you?
Or do they just make you start at the beginning again?
Is it that bad to get to experiment
the experiences of being part of being that of being everything
And I know that these dreams, they come at night
I don't care, I'm not scared anymore
Of what you'll say to my only thoughts
Just know that I am coming inside
to slay another lock
To write another book
Do you wanna sing on the hook?
Baby, with my dreams at night
You know I rock this shit all right
No fighting, fussing, fuck the fighting, yeah
You know
